constraints: One message per day maximum across all three groups combined
Rotate groups — do not post to the same group on consecutive days
Each message must have a different angle from the previous day
CTA must direct to managed account DMs only — no calls, no links, no landing pages
No emoji, no hype language, no hard close
Practical peer register — not a vendor pitch
Warmup budget limits apply — respect daily outbound_starts cap
schedules.goal: Send one outbound group message per day across swarmtestgroup, swarmtest2, and swarmtest3 for 7 days. Each message uses a different angle and ends with a direct CTA to move the conversation to managed account DMs. Voice: practical, no emoji, no hype, no hard sell. Rotate groups daily. Monitor DM responses and route to promoted thread reasoning surface.

constraints: Three messages per day — one to each group
Each message must have a different angle from the other two sent that day
Each message must have a different angle from the previous day's message to that same group
CTA must direct to managed account DMs only — no calls, no links, no landing pages
Stagger sends across the day — do not batch all three simultaneously
No emoji, no hype language, no hard close
Practical peer register — not a vendor pitch
Warmup budget limits apply — respect daily outbound_starts cap

Each message uses a different angle from the others that day and from the previous day's message to the same group. Every message ends with a direct CTA to move the conversation to managed account DMs. Voice: practical, no emoji, no hype, no hard sell. Stagger sends — do not post all three at the same time.
